license_strategy: Use official Drug Facts/product labels and original synthesis. Do not embed proprietary commercial dosing tables where terms prohibit AI/RAG use. Runtime must verify product-specific label.

ORIGINAL-OTC-001.title: Original OTC symptomatic recommendation and dosing governance framework
ORIGINAL-OTC-001.license_notes: Original authored framework. Requires physician/pharmacist/legal review before production.
ORIGINAL-OTC-001.used_for: OTC eligibility gates, dosing logic, contraindication gates, prescription scheduling support, RAG ranking rules.

FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.title: FDA OTC Drug Facts Label Framework
FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.license_notes: Official public health/regulatory source. Use requires final legal review.
FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.used_for: Drug Facts label, active ingredients, uses, warnings, directions, inactive ingredients.

FDA-APAP-001.title: FDA acetaminophen safety communications and labeling principles
FDA-APAP-001.license_notes: Official public health/regulatory source. Final legal review required.
FDA-APAP-001.used_for: Acetaminophen liver injury, duplicate ingredient and maximum-dose safety logic.

FDA-NSAID-001.title: FDA NSAID safety and OTC label warnings
FDA-NSAID-001.license_notes: Official public health/regulatory source. Final legal review required.
FDA-NSAID-001.used_for: NSAID cardiovascular, GI bleeding, kidney and pregnancy-risk gates.

FDA-DIPHEN-001.title: FDA warning on high-dose diphenhydramine
FDA-DIPHEN-001.license_notes: Official public health/regulatory source. Final legal review required.
FDA-DIPHEN-001.used_for: Diphenhydramine overdose, misuse, teen safety and high-dose toxicity gates.

FDA-PHENYLEPHRINE-001.title: FDA oral phenylephrine OTC monograph proposal
FDA-PHENYLEPHRINE-001.license_notes: Official public health/regulatory source. Final legal review required.
FDA-PHENYLEPHRINE-001.used_for: Oral phenylephrine should not be preferred for decongestion due efficacy concerns.

CDC-ORS-001.title: CDC oral rehydration / dehydration public-health guidance
CDC-ORS-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-ORS-001.license_notes: Official .gov public-health source. Final legal review required.
CDC-ORS-001.used_for: Oral rehydration solution and dehydration escalation framing.

CDC-FLU-PEDS-001.title: CDC flu emergency warning signs in children
CDC-FLU-PEDS-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-FLU-PEDS-001.license_notes: Official .gov public-health source. Final legal review required.
CDC-FLU-PEDS-001.used_for: Pediatric red flags that override OTC recommendations.

NIDDK-GASTRO-001.title: NIDDK viral gastroenteritis symptoms and causes
NIDDK-GASTRO-001.organization: National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases
NIDDK-GASTRO-001.license_notes: NIDDK majority copyright-free policy; final legal review required.

NIMH-SUICIDE-001.title: NIMH suicide prevention
NIMH-SUICIDE-001.license_notes: Official .gov source. Final legal review required.
NIMH-SUICIDE-001.used_for: Medication misuse, overdose, adolescent self-harm and crisis escalation.

DAILYMED-LABEL-001.title: DailyMed drug labeling database
DAILYMED-LABEL-001.license_notes: Official label repository; product-specific labels vary and must be checked at runtime.
DAILYMED-LABEL-001.used_for: Product-specific concentration, route, age band, warning and direction verification.

excluded_sources.title: Unlicensed commercial dosing charts copied verbatim
excluded_sources.reason: Avoid copyright and product-specific drift. Store generic dosing logic plus runtime label verification.

excluded_sources.title: Forums, social media, parent blogs, home remedy sites
Non-regulated supplement/homeopathy claims
excluded_sources.reason: Not treated as equivalent evidence for OTC drug recommendation.
